finding_results.notes: The floor entry now starts on the absent morning rhythm and the coworkers' altered behavior instead of re-listing the evaluation floor's baseline fixtures.

Added a concrete post-audit floor beat that puts the weekly-check machinery on Bao and Priya in real time, then carries that pressure into Nick's decision to accelerate. Final chapter word count validated at 4748.

summary: Removed the redundant floor re-inventory at the opening and expanded the Friday aftermath with a consequential floor beat, bringing the chapter above the length floor while sharpening the chapter's metrics-to-human-cost pressure.
